---
name: Google Drive folder structure
description: Archived docs: Drive/Pipeline/Archive/<YYYY>/<MM>/<doc-type>/<date>-<doc-id>-<doc-type>.pdf.
type: reference
---

All processed docs archive to: `Drive/Pipeline/Archive/<YYYY>/<MM>/<doc-type>/<date>-<doc-id>-<doc-type>.pdf`

Example: `Drive/Pipeline/Archive/2026/05/rate-con/2026-05-09-lc-88234-rate-con.pdf`

Never flat-dump into root `Archive/` — folder structure is required for the search index to work correctly.
